# Ai Buyer Concierge Rules Template

Converted from `35_ai_buyer_concierge_rules_template.csv` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

| rule_area | allowed | not_allowed | escalate_when | approved_source | example_safe_answer | notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Pricing | Explain public plans and links | Invent discounts or custom terms | Enterprise/custom pricing request | Pricing page | Our published pricing is here. For custom procurement terms, I can route you to sales. | Example |
| Security | Summarize approved security page | Invent compliance status | Security questionnaire or audit request | Security page / SOC2 report | We use encryption in transit and at rest as described in our security page. | Example |
| Competitors | Explain fit differences from approved comparison pages | Defame competitor or claim unsupported superiority | Buyer asks for legal/contractual assurances | Comparison pages | Choose us when X; choose competitor when Y. | Example |
